option.name: originalContent
option.value:
spring.application.name=todo-sdd-backend
# Serve the bundled OpenAPI spec (placed in src/main/resources/static/api.yml) springdoc.swagger-ui.url=/api.yml # Optional: keep generated docs available (set to false if you want only the spec file) # springdoc.api-docs.enabled=false

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
spring.application.name=todo-sdd-backend
# Serve the bundled OpenAPI spec (placed in src/main/resources/static/api.yml) springdoc.swagger-ui.url=/api.yml # Optional: keep generated docs available (set to false if you want only the spec file) # springdoc.api-docs.enabled=false
